model_information.description: Population K-PD model for inclisiran with PCSK9 and LDL-C indirect response mechanisms.
model_information.author: Jane Knochel
model_information.output_label: Inclisiran concentration (mg), Predicted PCSK9 (ng/mL), Predicted LDL-C (mg/dL), PCSK9 (ng/mL), LDL-C (mg/dL)
model_information.applications: Dose-selection, clinical trial simulation, population PK-PD analysis
